description: Validates whether accounts flagged in the population as settled in full (SIF) have sufficient corroborating evidence in account tags and AR activity logs. Produces a step-level evidence decision and a final account-level QC verdict.

agents.purpose: Retrieves structured population batches. Performs no QC judgment.
Gathers raw evidence for one account using registered evidence tools. Returns evidence only.
Evaluates evidence and rules to produce step-level or final-level QC decisions. Does not retrieve data.

population_phase.description: Retrieve the accounts to be reviewed. The orchestrator runs this phase once per batch before entering the account phase.

steps.title: Load population batch
steps.objective: Retrieve a paginated batch of accounts in scope for this QC run.

account_phase.description: For each account in the population batch, the orchestrator runs evidence collection, then step-level decisions, then the final account decision. Steps are driven by depends_on and step_type — the orchestrator must not hardcode a fixed sequence.

steps.title: Collect settlement evidence
steps.objective: Gather account-level evidence for all settlement-related checks. Run all listed evidence tools for the account.
steps.checkpoint_note: In checkpoint scope, run for the first account only.

steps.title: Evaluate settlement evidence
steps.objective: Apply the settlement evaluation rules to the collected evidence. Return a structured step-level decision: pass, fail, insufficient_evidence, or manual_review.
steps.orchestration_hint: Call make_qc_decision with decision_mode=step_decision. Pass account_context, evidence_bundle from acct-1, and the rule subset for evaluation_rule_ids listed here.

steps.title: Final account QC verdict
steps.objective: Aggregate all step-level decisions for this account into one final QC verdict: pass, fail, or manual_review.
steps.orchestration_hint: Call make_qc_decision with decision_mode=final_decision. Pass account_context, the list of completed step_decisions (acct-2), and the rule subset for evaluation_rule_ids listed here.

evaluation_rules.title: SIF tag alignment
evaluation_rules.description: The account tag SIF presence must align with settlement_flag. If settlement_flag=Y, sif_present must be true to pass. If settlement_flag=N, sif_present must be false to pass. Any mismatch is a fail or manual_review.

evaluation_rules.title: AR log direct settlement record
evaluation_rules.description: If settlement_flag=Y, the AR log must contain at least one row with settled_in_full_found=true to pass. If settlement_flag=N and settled_in_full_found=true, this is a contradiction and must fail.

evaluation_rules.title: AR log comment secondary check
evaluation_rules.description: When no direct settled_in_full rows exist, the latest AR log comment is reviewed for secondary settlement implication. If settlement_flag=Y and the comment implies settlement, this can support a pass. If settlement_flag=N and the comment implies settlement, this is a soft contradiction.

evaluation_rules.title: Final verdict aggregation
evaluation_rules.description: Aggregates step-level decisions for the account. If any required step decision is fail, the final verdict is fail. If any is insufficient_evidence, the final verdict is manual_review. If any is manual_review, the final verdict is manual_review. If all are pass, the final verdict is pass.

decision_policy.description: The orchestrator may call the decision agent dynamically whenever sufficient evidence exists for a step. Step decisions are not batched — they are triggered per account as soon as the required depends_on steps are complete. The final decision is triggered after all required step decisions for the account are complete.

checkpoint_scope.description: Limits for local testing and flow validation. Not for production use.
checkpoint_scope.selection_rule: process the first account in the first batch only
